// reporters: PrivHolderDecl.java.txt#PrivHolder.reportPriv
package com.other;

import com.consumer.priv.PrivHolder;

// A real call site in another class, qualified through a variable of the
// declared type: the private declared method still resolves and matches -
// a capture, no finding.
class Tier2PrivateQualifiedCapture {
    void m() {
        PrivHolder holder = new PrivHolder();
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            holder.reportPriv(e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
